query:
UPDATE patients 
SET 
  name = 'Lawrence "Larry" Critzer',
  dateOfBirth = '1947-02-23',
  baselineWeightLbs = 176,
  baselineSysBp = 158,
  baselineDiaBp = 98,
  baselinePulse = 90,
  baselineSpo2 = 94,
  fluidLimitOz = 64,
  sodiumLimitMg = 2000,
  caregiverName = 'Shaun Critzer',
  familyContactName = 'Priscilla Critzer',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id = 1;
